sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(String), date DateTime, extra Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'example1', NOW(), 10), (2, NULL, NOW(), 20), (3, 'example3', NOW(), 30);
SELECT id, value, date, extra FROM test_table WHERE value GLOBAL NOT IN ('invalid', 'foo') AND extra > 0;
CREATE TABLE remote_test AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT * FROM remote_test WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table) AND value IS NULL;
SELECT id, value, date, extra FROM test_table WHERE id > (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table) - 1;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) as count FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING count GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT MIN(count) FROM (SELECT id, COUNT(*) as count FROM test_table GROUP BY id));
CREATE TABLE distributed_table AS SELECT id, date, COALESCE(value, 'default') as coalesce_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, extra FROM distributed_table WHERE extra < 0 AND id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE extra = 20);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (4, 'example4', NOW(), NULL), (5, NULL, NOW(), -10);
SELECT id, {1, 2, 3} AS replicas GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT extra FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
